steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The subject is "researchers like Aliya Bhatia of the Center for Democracy and Technology." The head noun is 'researchers' (plural). The blank must be a present-tense verb that agrees with a plural subject.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "fears": does not agree with the plural subject 'researchers.' ✗
  • "has feared": does not agree with the plural subject 'researchers.' ✗
  • "fear": plural present-tense verb; agrees with the plural subject 'researchers.' ✓
  • "is fearful": does not agree with the plural subject 'researchers.' ✗
That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
